cases.input: If teeth were pearls, would mouths be oyster shells? Answer in detached observer voice.
Tell a short story-style explanation of one theoretical physics concept in 120-160 words, detached observer voice, and avoid first-person plural pronouns.
Write a short one-paragraph critique (80-120 words) on human-AI interaction in visual culture. Use at least one '-our' spelling naturally (for example: colour, favour, honour, neighbour).
